info.name: Ocrolus API
info.description:
Ocrolus document automation platform API. Folders match the docs.ocrolus.com/reference sidebar structure.

## Setup
1. Set the `BASE_URL` collection variable to `https://api.ocrolus.com`
2. Set `OCROLUS_CLIENT_ID` and `OCROLUS_CLIENT_SECRET` as secrets
3. Call Authentication → oauth/token to get a bearer token
4. Save the returned `access_token` to the `ACCESS_TOKEN` variable

All other requests use `Authorization: Bearer {{ACCESS_TOKEN}}`.

request.description:
Body: form-encoded (NOT JSON). OAuth 2.0 client_credentials grant. Returns JWT with 24h expiry. No 'audience' param.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/grant-authentication-token

Returns pk (integer) and uuid (string) for the new Book.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/create-a-book

Body (JSON): exactly one of book_id (integer) or book_uuid (UUID string).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/delete-a-book

Body: JSON. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID string) + fields to update.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/update-book

item.name: Book Queries
item.description: Read Book information, status, and related loan data

request.description:
Path param: pk (integer).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-info

Query params: page, per_page (both optional).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-list

Query param: book_pk (integer). Alt path: /v1/book/{pk}/status also works.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-status

Path param: loan_id (string).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-from-loan

Path param: pk (integer).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/loan-from-book

item.name: File Uploads
item.description: Upload documents, paystubs, images, and Plaid data to Books

request.description:
Form: multipart/form-data. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID). Max 200MB. form_type and doc_name optional.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-document

item.name: book/upload/mixed — Upload a mixed document PDF

request.description:
Form: multipart/form-data. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID). Multiple doc types in single PDF.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-mixed-document

item.name: book/upload/paystub — Upload a pay stub PDF

request.description:
Form: multipart/form-data. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-paystub

Form: multipart/form-data. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-image

Body: JSON. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/mark-image-group-complete

Body: JSON. Provide pk (integer) or book_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upload-json

Body: JSON. Production only. Requires auditor_id: 'ocrolus'.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/import-plaid-asset-report

item.name: File Commands
item.description: Cancel, delete, download, and upgrade documents

request.description:
Path param: doc_uuid (UUID). Body (JSON, optional): doc_pk or doc_uuid, accept_charges. Official spec also supports query-param style: /v1/document/cancel?doc_uuid=X

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/cancel-file-verification

Body (JSON): exactly one of doc_id (integer) or doc_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/delete-a-file
Body (JSON): exactly one of pk (integer) or doc_uuid (UUID).

Path param: doc_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/document-download

Path param: doc_uuid (UUID). Body (JSON): doc_pk or doc_uuid + upgrade_type. Official spec also supports: /v1/document/upgrade?doc_uuid=X

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upgrade-doc

Body (JSON): mixed_doc_pk (integer) or mixed_doc_uuid (UUID) + upgrade_type.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/upgrade-mixed-doc

Query params: exactly one of pk (integer), doc_uuid (UUID), or mixed_doc_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/mixed-document-status

item.name: Classify
item.description: Identify document types with confidence scores

request.description:
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Identifies 300+ document types with confidence scores (0-1).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-classification-summary

Path param: mixed_doc_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/mixed-doc-classification-summary

Path param: mixed_doc_uuid (UUID). Organizes forms into logical groups with uniqueness values.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/grouped-mixed-doc-classification-summary

item.name: Capture
item.description: Extract structured data from documents (forms, paystubs, transactions)

request.description:
Path param: pk (integer).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-form-data

item.name: book/{pk}/paystubs — Get book pay stub data

request.description:
Path param: pk (integer).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-paystub-data

Path param: doc_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/doc-form-data

item.name: document/{doc_uuid}/paystubs — Get document pay stub data

request.description:
Path param: doc_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/doc-paystub-data

Path param: form_uuid (UUID). Returns confidence scores per field (0-1).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/form-field-data

Path param: paystub_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/paystub-data

query.description: Filter by uploaded document primary key

request.description:
Path param: pk (integer). Query params (optional): uploaded_doc_pk, uploaded_doc_uuid, only_tagged, distinct_fields. Alt: /v1/transaction?book_pk=X also works.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/transactions

item.name: Detect
item.description: Fraud detection signals, authenticity scores, and reason codes

request.description:
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns authenticity scores (0-100), reason codes, and signal types.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-fraud-signals

Path param: doc_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/doc-fraud-signals

Path param: visualization_uuid (UUID). Returns binary image with fraud signal overlays.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/signal-visualization

DEPRECATED. Use /v2/detect/ endpoints instead. Path param: book_uuid (UUID).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/suspicious-activity

**DEPRECATED.**

item.name: Analyze
item.description: Cash flow analytics, enriched transactions, and risk scoring

request.description:
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns daily balances, PII, and time series data.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/book-summary

query.description: Min days for most recent month (default 0, use 32 for full months only)

request.description:
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Query param: min_days_to_include (integer, optional).

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/cash-flow-features

Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns transactions with categories and tags.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/enriched-transactions

Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns probability of default.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/risk-score
Path param: book_uuid (UUID). NAICS4-based benchmarking. Beta feature.

Path param: book_uuid (UUID). Returns .xlsx binary content.

**Docs:** https://docs.ocrolus.com/reference/analytics-excel
